explanations.1: This checks that the requested file does NOT end with common image/icon/stylesheet extensions (the ! means 'not'), and [NC] means the check ignores uppercase vs lowercase.
explanations.2: Similar to line 1, but specifically for .js files; the (\?.*)?$ part means it also matches .js files that have query parameters like ?v=123.
explanations.3: This checks that the request is NOT a font file (eot, svg, ttf, woff formats), and like line 2, the (\?.*)?$ allows for query parameters on font files.
explanations.5: The RewriteRule . - [F] means 'for any request that passed all the conditions above, deny access with a 403 Forbidden error'; the dash (-) means 'don't rewrite to anything else'.
